concepts.name: ManifestConfig
concepts.what: Configures the version source manifest.

properties.name: source
properties.description: Manifest file to read the version from.  Use `'auto'` for file-existence detection or a specific filename.

properties.name: path
properties.description: Dotted key path to the version field within the manifest.  For example `'version'` for package.json, `'package.version'` for Cargo.toml, or `'project.version'` for pyproject.toml.

properties.name: regex
properties.description: Regex pattern to extract the version from source-code manifests.  Capture group 1 must contain the version string.

concepts.name: SemVerConfig
concepts.what: Configures SemVer validation rules.

properties.name: allowVPrefix
properties.description: Tolerates a leading `v` prefix (e.g. `v1.2.3`).  When enabled the prefix is stripped before parsing.

properties.name: allowBuildMetadata
properties.description: Permits `+build` metadata on version strings.

properties.name: requirePrerelease
properties.description: Requires every version to carry a prerelease label.

concepts.name: CalVerConfig
concepts.what: Configures CalVer validation rules.

properties.name: format
properties.description: Calendar format used when parsing and validating versions.

properties.name: preventFutureDates
properties.description: Rejects versions that point to a future date.

properties.name: strictMutualExclusion
properties.description: Enforces that week tokens (WW/0W) cannot be mixed with month/day tokens.

concepts.name: SyncConfig
concepts.what: Configures files and patterns that should stay in sync with the canonical version.

properties.name: files
properties.description: File globs or paths that should be scanned for version updates.

properties.name: patterns
properties.description: Replacement patterns applied to matching files.

concepts.name: ChangelogConfig
concepts.what: Controls changelog validation behavior.

properties.name: enabled
properties.description: Enables changelog validation.

properties.name: file
properties.description: Path to the changelog file to inspect.

properties.name: strict
properties.description: Treats changelog problems as hard failures.

properties.name: requireEntry
properties.description: Requires an entry for the current version.

properties.name: enforceStructure
properties.description: Validates that changelog section headers use only allowed names.  When enabled, any `### SectionName` header not present in `sections` is reported as an error.

properties.name: sections
properties.description: Allowed Keep a Changelog section names.  Only applied when `enforceStructure` is `true`.

concepts.name: GitHooksConfig
concepts.what: Toggles each supported git hook integration.

properties.name: 'pre-commit'
properties.description: Enables validation during the `pre-commit` hook.

properties.name: 'pre-push'
properties.description: Enables validation during the `pre-push` hook.

properties.name: 'post-tag'
properties.description: Enables follow-up tasks after a tag is created.

concepts.name: GitConfig
concepts.what: Configures git-related enforcement.

properties.name: hooks
properties.description: Hook toggles used by the CLI and validation workflow.

properties.name: enforceHooks
properties.description: Fails validation when required hooks are missing.

concepts.name: GitHubConfig
concepts.what: Configures GitHub-specific integration features.

properties.name: dependabot
properties.description: Generates `.github/dependabot.yml` from detected manifests during init.

concepts.name: VersioningConfig
concepts.what: Configures the active versioning mode.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Versioning strategy used for the project.

properties.name: schemeRules
properties.description: Scheme-level validation rules applied regardless of versioning type.

properties.name: semver
properties.description: SemVer-specific settings when `type` is `'semver'`.

properties.name: calver
properties.description: CalVer-specific settings when `type` is `'calver'`.

concepts.name: ScanAllowlistEntry
concepts.what: An intentional version reference that should be excluded from scan results.

properties.name: file
properties.description: Glob pattern matching the file(s) where this reference is intentional.

properties.name: reason
properties.description: Reason this reference is allowed (for documentation / review).

concepts.name: ScanConfig
concepts.what: Configures repo-wide scanning for hardcoded version literals.

properties.name: enabled
properties.description: Enables repo-wide scanning for stale version literals.

properties.name: patterns
properties.description: Regex patterns that match version-like strings in source files.  Capture group 1 must contain the version string.

properties.name: allowlist
properties.description: Files containing intentional version references that should not be flagged.

concepts.name: GuardConfig
concepts.what: Configures guard check behavior (hook bypass detection).

properties.name: enabled
properties.description: Enables hook bypass detection in validate.

concepts.name: PublishConfig
concepts.what: Configures registry publish status verification.

properties.name: enabled
properties.description: Enables registry publish status check.

properties.name: timeout
properties.description: Timeout in ms for registry HTTP/CLI calls.

properties.name: registryUrl
properties.description: Override registry URL for private registries.

concepts.name: PublishCheckResult
concepts.what: Result of a registry publish status check.

properties.name: published
properties.description: Whether the version exists on the registry.

properties.name: registry
properties.description: Registry name (npm, crates.io, pypi, etc.).

properties.name: packageName
properties.description: Package name as read from the manifest.

properties.name: error
properties.description: Set when the check could not complete (network, timeout).

concepts.name: VersionGuardConfig
concepts.what: Top-level configuration consumed by versionguard.

properties.name: versioning
properties.description: Active versioning settings.

properties.name: manifest
properties.description: Version source manifest settings.

properties.name: sync
properties.description: Synchronization settings for mirrored version strings.

properties.name: changelog
properties.description: Changelog validation settings.

properties.name: git
properties.description: Git enforcement settings.

properties.name: github
properties.description: GitHub integration settings.

properties.name: scan
properties.description: Repo-wide version literal scanning.

properties.name: guard
properties.description: Guard check configuration (hook bypass detection).

properties.name: publish
properties.description: Registry publish status verification.

properties.name: ignore
properties.description: Files or patterns excluded from validation.

concepts.name: ValidationResult
concepts.what: Result returned by version parsing and validation helpers.

properties.name: valid
properties.description: Indicates whether validation completed without errors.

properties.name: errors
properties.description: Collected validation issues.

properties.name: version
properties.description: Parsed version details when validation succeeds.

concepts.name: SyncResult
concepts.what: Reports the result of synchronizing a single file.

properties.name: file
properties.description: File that was inspected or updated.

properties.name: updated
properties.description: Indicates whether the file content changed.

properties.name: changes
properties.description: Detailed replacements applied within the file.

concepts.name: FullValidationResult
concepts.what: Combined result from a full project validation run.

properties.name: valid
properties.description: Indicates whether all checks passed.

properties.name: version
properties.description: Canonical version string used for validation.

properties.name: versionValid
properties.description: Indicates whether the root version string is valid.

properties.name: syncValid
properties.description: Indicates whether synchronized files are in sync.

properties.name: changelogValid
properties.description: Indicates whether changelog checks passed.

properties.name: scanValid
properties.description: Indicates whether repo-wide scan passed (no stale version literals).

properties.name: guardValid
properties.description: Indicates whether guard checks passed (no hook bypass detected).

properties.name: publishValid
properties.description: Indicates whether the publish check passed.

properties.name: publishCheck
properties.description: Detailed publish check result when publish checks are enabled.

properties.name: guardReport
properties.description: Detailed guard check report when guard checks are enabled.

properties.name: errors
properties.description: Human-readable validation failures collected during the run.

concepts.name: ChangelogValidationResult
concepts.what: Describes the outcome of validating a changelog file.

properties.name: valid
properties.description: Indicates whether the changelog satisfies all requested checks.

properties.name: errors
properties.description: Human-readable validation errors.

properties.name: hasEntryForVersion
properties.description: Indicates whether the changelog contains an entry for the requested version.

concepts.name: ChangelogStructureOptions
concepts.what: Options for changelog structure enforcement.

properties.name: enforceStructure
properties.description: Validate section headers against an allowed list.

properties.name: sections
properties.description: Allowed section names. Defaults to Keep a Changelog standard sections.

concepts.name: CkmConfigEntry
concepts.what: A config schema entry with type, description, and default.

properties.name: key
properties.description: Dotted key path (e.g., `'CalVerConfig.format'`).

properties.name: type
properties.description: TypeScript type.

properties.name: description
properties.description: Description from TSDoc.

properties.name: default
properties.description: Default value if specified via `@defaultValue`.

concepts.name: FeedbackResult
concepts.what: Aggregates validation errors with suggested next steps.

properties.name: valid
properties.description: Indicates whether the inspected version state is valid.

properties.name: errors
properties.description: Validation errors collected during the check.

properties.name: suggestions
properties.description: Suggested next steps for resolving the reported issues.

properties.name: canAutoFix
properties.description: Indicates whether at least one suggestion can be auto-applied.

concepts.name: FixResult
concepts.what: Fix entry point exports for auto-remediation helpers.

properties.name: fixed
properties.description: Indicates whether the operation changed repository state.

properties.name: message
properties.description: Human-readable description of the fix attempt.

properties.name: file
properties.description: Absolute path to the file that was updated, when applicable.

concepts.name: ProjectRootResult
concepts.what: Result of project root detection.

properties.name: found
properties.description: Whether a project root was found.

properties.name: root
properties.description: The resolved project root directory, or the original cwd if not found.

properties.name: marker
properties.description: Which marker file was found.

properties.name: hasConfig
properties.description: Whether the directory has a VersionGuard config.

properties.name: hasGit
properties.description: Whether the directory is inside a git repository.

properties.name: hasManifest
properties.description: Whether a version manifest file exists.

concepts.name: InitOptions
concepts.what: Options for headless (non-interactive) initialization.

properties.name: cwd
properties.description: Working directory path.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Versioning type (semver or calver).

properties.name: format
properties.description: CalVer format string.

properties.name: allowVPrefix
properties.description: Allow v-prefix on SemVer versions.

properties.name: allowBuildMetadata
properties.description: Allow build metadata on SemVer versions.

properties.name: requirePrerelease
properties.description: Require prerelease labels on SemVer versions.

properties.name: manifest
properties.description: Manifest source type.

properties.name: github
properties.description: Whether to generate GitHub integration files (dependabot.yml).

properties.name: hooks
properties.description: Whether to install git hooks.

properties.name: changelog
properties.description: Whether to enable changelog validation.

properties.name: yes
properties.description: Accept defaults without prompting.

properties.name: force
properties.description: Overwrite existing config.

operations.name: validateModifier
operations.what: Validates a pre-release / modifier tag against the allowed modifiers list.

inputs.name: modifier
inputs.description: Raw modifier string (e.g. `"alpha.1"`, `"rc2"`, `"dev"`).

inputs.name: schemeRules
inputs.description: Scheme rules containing the allowed modifiers list.

outputs.text: A validation error when the modifier is disallowed, otherwise `null`.

operations.name: validate
operations.what: Validates a CalVer string against formatting and date rules.

inputs.name: version
inputs.description: Version string to validate.

inputs.name: calverFormat
inputs.description: Format expected for the version string.

inputs.name: preventFutureDates
inputs.description: Whether future dates should be reported as errors.

inputs.name: schemeRules
inputs.description: Optional scheme rules for modifier validation and segment count warnings.

outputs.text: A validation result containing any discovered errors and the parsed version on success.

operations.name: validateChangelog
operations.what: Validates a changelog file for release readiness.

inputs.name: changelogPath
inputs.description: Path to the changelog file.

inputs.name: version
inputs.description: Version that must be present in the changelog.

inputs.name: strict
inputs.description: Whether to require compare links and dated release headings.

inputs.name: requireEntry
inputs.description: Whether the requested version must already have an entry.

inputs.name: structure
inputs.description: Optional structure enforcement options.

outputs.text: The result of validating the changelog file.

operations.name: createCkmEngine
operations.what: Creates a CKM engine from a parsed manifest.

inputs.name: manifest
inputs.description: Parsed CKM manifest (from forge-ts `ckm.json`).

outputs.text: A configured CKM engine.

operations.name: checkHardcodedVersions
operations.what: Checks configured files for hardcoded version mismatches.

inputs.name: expectedVersion
inputs.description: Version all matching entries should use.

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: Sync configuration describing files and replacement patterns.

inputs.name: ignorePatterns
inputs.description: Glob patterns to exclude while scanning.

inputs.name: cwd
inputs.description: Project directory used to resolve file globs.

outputs.text: A list of detected version mismatches.

operations.name: generateDependabotConfig
operations.what: Generates Dependabot YAML configuration from detected manifests.

inputs.name: manifests
inputs.description: Detected manifest source types from the project.

outputs.text: The Dependabot configuration as a YAML string.

operations.name: generateHookScript
operations.what: Generates the shell script content for a Git hook.

inputs.name: hookName
inputs.description: Name of the Git hook to generate.

outputs.text: Executable shell script contents for the hook.

operations.name: checkHooksPathOverride
operations.what: Checks whether git hooks have been redirected away from the repository.

inputs.name: cwd
inputs.description: Repository directory to inspect.

outputs.text: A guard warning when a hooksPath override is detected.

operations.name: checkHuskyBypass
operations.what: Checks whether the HUSKY environment variable is disabling hooks.

outputs.text: A guard warning when the HUSKY bypass is detected.

operations.name: checkHookIntegrity
operations.what: Verifies that installed hook scripts match the expected content.

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: VersionGuard configuration that defines which hooks should exist.

inputs.name: cwd
inputs.description: Repository directory to inspect.

outputs.text: Guard warnings for each hook that has been tampered with.

operations.name: checkEnforceHooksPolicy
operations.what: Checks whether hooks are configured as required but not enforced.

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: VersionGuard configuration to inspect.

outputs.text: A guard warning when hooks are enabled but not enforced.

operations.name: runGuardChecks
operations.what: Runs all guard checks and returns a consolidated report.

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: VersionGuard configuration.

inputs.name: cwd
inputs.description: Repository directory to inspect.

outputs.text: A guard report with all findings.

operations.name: checkPublishStatus
operations.what: Checks whether a package version has been published to its ecosystem registry.

inputs.name: manifestSource
inputs.description: The detected manifest source type.

inputs.name: packageName
inputs.description: Package name as read from the manifest.

inputs.name: version
inputs.description: Version string to check.

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: Publish configuration with timeout and optional registry URL.

outputs.text: The publish check result.

operations.name: initConfig
operations.what: Initializes a new VersionGuard config file in a project.

inputs.name: cwd
inputs.description: Project directory where the config should be created.

outputs.text: The path to the created config file.

operations.name: createTag
operations.what: Creates a release tag and optionally fixes version state first.

inputs.name: version
inputs.description: Version to embed in the new tag name.

inputs.name: message
inputs.description: Custom annotated tag message.

inputs.name: autoFix
inputs.description: Whether to auto-fix version mismatches before tagging.

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: Loaded VersionGuard configuration used for validation and fixes.

inputs.name: cwd
inputs.description: Repository directory where git commands should run.

outputs.text: The tagging outcome and any actions performed along the way.

operations.name: validateTagForPush
operations.what: Validates that a local tag is safe to push to the default remote.

inputs.name: tagName
inputs.description: Name of the tag to validate.

inputs.name: cwd
inputs.description: Repository directory where git commands should run.

outputs.text: A validation result with an optional suggested fix command.

operations.name: validateVersion
operations.what: Validates a version string against the active versioning strategy.

inputs.name: version
inputs.description: Version string to validate.

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: VersionGuard configuration that selects the validation rules.

outputs.text: The validation result for the provided version.

operations.name: runWizard
operations.what: Runs the interactive setup wizard.

inputs.name: cwd
inputs.description: Project directory to initialize.

outputs.text: The path to the created config file, or `null` if cancelled.

operations.name: runHeadless
operations.what: Initializes VersionGuard non-interactively using CLI flags.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Headless initialization options.

outputs.text: The path to the created config file.

operations.name: createProgram
operations.what: Creates the VersionGuard CLI program definition.

outputs.text: A configured Commander program for the VersionGuard CLI.

operations.name: runCli
operations.what: Parses CLI arguments and executes the matching command.

inputs.name: argv
inputs.description: Full argument vector to parse.

operations.name: createTempProject
operations.what: Creates a temporary project directory with a minimal `package.json` fixture.

outputs.text: The absolute path to the temporary project directory.

operations.name: initGitRepo
operations.what: Initializes a git repository in a fixture directory with a first commit.

inputs.name: cwd
inputs.description: Absolute path to the fixture repository.

operations.name: createBareRemote
operations.what: Creates a bare git repository to use as a remote in integration tests.

outputs.text: The absolute path to the new bare repository.

configSchema.description: Manifest file to read the version from.  Use `'auto'` for file-existence detection or a specific filename.
Dotted key path to the version field within the manifest.  For example `'version'` for package.json, `'package.version'` for Cargo.toml, or `'project.version'` for pyproject.toml.
Regex pattern to extract the version from source-code manifests.  Capture group 1 must contain the version string.
Tolerates a leading `v` prefix (e.g. `v1.2.3`).  When enabled the prefix is stripped before parsing.
Permits `+build` metadata on version strings.
Requires every version to carry a prerelease label.
Calendar format used when parsing and validating versions.
Rejects versions that point to a future date.
Enforces that week tokens (WW/0W) cannot be mixed with month/day tokens.
File globs or paths that should be scanned for version updates.
Replacement patterns applied to matching files.
Enables changelog validation.
Path to the changelog file to inspect.
Treats changelog problems as hard failures.
Requires an entry for the current version.
Validates that changelog section headers use only allowed names.  When enabled, any `### SectionName` header not present in `sections` is reported as an error.
Allowed Keep a Changelog section names.  Only applied when `enforceStructure` is `true`.
Enables validation during the `pre-commit` hook.
Enables validation during the `pre-push` hook.
Enables follow-up tasks after a tag is created.
Hook toggles used by the CLI and validation workflow.
Fails validation when required hooks are missing.
Generates `.github/dependabot.yml` from detected manifests during init.
Versioning strategy used for the project.
Scheme-level validation rules applied regardless of versioning type.
SemVer-specific settings when `type` is `'semver'`.
configSchema.default: `{ allowVPrefix: false, allowBuildMetadata: true, requirePrerelease: false }`

configSchema.description: CalVer-specific settings when `type` is `'calver'`.
Enables repo-wide scanning for stale version literals.
Regex patterns that match version-like strings in source files.  Capture group 1 must contain the version string.
configSchema.default: Patterns matching common version formats in code, CI, and Docker files.

configSchema.description: Files containing intentional version references that should not be flagged.
Enables hook bypass detection in validate.
Enables registry publish status check.
Timeout in ms for registry HTTP/CLI calls.
Override registry URL for private registries.
Active versioning settings.
Version source manifest settings.
Synchronization settings for mirrored version strings.
Changelog validation settings.
Git enforcement settings.
GitHub integration settings.
Repo-wide version literal scanning.
Guard check configuration (hook bypass detection).
Registry publish status verification.
Files or patterns excluded from validation.
Validate section headers against an allowed list.
Allowed section names. Defaults to Keep a Changelog standard sections.
Dotted key path (e.g., `'CalVerConfig.format'`).
TypeScript type.
Description from TSDoc.
Default value if specified via `@defaultValue`.
Working directory path.
Versioning type (semver or calver).
CalVer format string.
Allow v-prefix on SemVer versions.
Allow build metadata on SemVer versions.
Require prerelease labels on SemVer versions.
Manifest source type.
Whether to generate GitHub integration files (dependabot.yml).
Whether to install git hooks.
Whether to enable changelog validation.
Accept defaults without prompting.
Overwrite existing config.
